groq_prompt:
You are looking at 3 sequential frames from a table tennis (ping pong) match showing a single shot.

Identify the shot from this list:
- forehand_loop: topspin attacking shot from the forehand side
- backhand_loop: topspin attacking shot from the backhand side
- forehand_drive: flat fast shot from the forehand side
- backhand_drive: flat fast shot from the backhand side
- push: short backspin defensive shot
- chop: heavy backspin defensive shot
- serve: opening shot, ball tossed and struck
- smash: hard finishing kill shot
- flick: short flicked attack from over the table
- block: short return blocking opponent's loop

Respond in EXACTLY this format, nothing else:
SHOT: <one of: forehand_loop|backhand_loop|forehand_drive|backhand_drive|push|chop|serve|smash|flick|block|unknown>
CONFIDENCE: <number from 0.0 to 1.0>
